name: Architech Ascension Design System
description: Source of truth for colors, typography, motion, spacing, and component patterns across all apps.

colors.usage: Primary text, buttons, headings, icons, overlays
Page background, light gradients, scrollbar track
Cards, nav bar, modals, form shells
Muted text, borders, dividers, scrollbar thumb

backgrounds.decorativeGlows: subtle gold/navy blurs at low opacity

navigation.style: fixed, transparent to glass blur on scroll, subtle shadow
navigation.layout: logo left, links spaced 10-12px, pill CTA right

hero.headline: centered, typing effect with blinking caret in brand navy
hero.visuals: subtle gold glow and light grid/automation wiring motifs

cards.base: white surface, rounded-2xl, border brand-gray/20, shadow-premium
cards.hover: shadow-premium-hover, border shifts toward navy/gold, slight lift
cards.icons: 48-56px tiles, bg brand-navy/5 or white with thin border, Lucide/SVG icons

lists.checkStyle: small circle with gold/navy fill and Lucide check (12-14px)
lists.text: text-brand-navy/80 at text-sm/base with relaxed leading

buttons.primary: navy pill with white text; gold accent on hover
buttons.ghost: transparent with navy border or brand-navy/5 fill
buttons.links: navy text; hover to gold; underline only on hover

forms.containers: white, rounded-xl, border brand-gray/20, generous padding
forms.inputs: min-height 44px, rounded-lg, border brand-gray/20, focus ring in brand.navy with gold accents

sections.services: three-card grid, icon squares, tight headings, divider in header
sections.features: alternating two-column image/text, badge with gold border above headings
sections.portfolio: image cards with slight grayscale, fade overlay, hover lift; gold category tag
sections.testimonials: white bordered card with premium shadow for embeds
sections.courses: card grid, price pill on image, text stack below
sections.newsletter: gold pill label, centered headline, embed inside bordered shell
sections.contact: white container around calendar embed, consistent with form shells
sections.social: glassy white card on blurred gold/navy glows, stacked link buttons with navy borders

footer.cta: final CTA with navy primary button and outline secondary
footer.bottom: thin top border row, gray tertiary links that lift to navy on hover

photos.treatment: mix-blend-multiply at 80-90% opacity, subtle zoom on hover

backgrounds.motifs: light grids (brand-gray/08), soft circles, dashed connectors in gold/navy to imply systems

accessibility.contrast: Use navy text on light surfaces to meet 4.5:1; avoid gold for main body text
accessibility.focus: Visible navy or gold outlines even on pill buttons
accessibility.motion: Honor prefers-reduced-motion; avoid mandatory animations in critical flows

implementation.coreTrio: max-w-7xl container + rounded-2xl cards + shadow-premium for any new page
